# Repository instructions

This repository is part of a larger EV charge points monitoring ecosystem.

The system is designed to support the monitoring and management of electric vehicle (EV) charging stations.
It provides a centralized platform for installers to oversee multiple charging points, ensuring they are operational and efficiently managed.

# Business context

This repository is designed to address the specific needs of EV charge point installers,
providing them with the tools and capabilities to effectively monitor and manage charging stations in the field.

Thus, installers will be able to quickly identify and resolve issues, ensuring minimal downtime and optimal performance of charging stations.

List of features, not exhaustive:

- Manage a list of charging stations
- Attach charging stations to geographical sites
- Real-time monitoring of charging station status
- Remote diagnostics and troubleshooting
- Maintenance scheduling and management
- Usage analytics and reporting

## Ubiquitous language

- Charging station === Charge point
- A site is a geographical location where one or more charging stations are installed.
- A user is an individual who interacts with the system, typically an installer or technician.
